revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 18 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 18 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦11月18日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[寿永]]2年<!--（[[1183年]]_月_日）--> - [[平氏]]追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]]が、[[後白河法皇]]の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * [[元文]]5年<!--（[[1740年]]_月_日）--> - [[徳川吉宗]]の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]]が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]]を創設 * [[寛政]]9年<!--（[[1797年]]_月_日）--> - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[寛政暦]]」を採用。翌年から実施
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[天保]]11年<!--（[[1840年]]_月_日）--> - [[光格天皇]]、119代[[天皇]]（* [[1771年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月17日 (旧暦)|11月17日]] 翌日[[11月19日 (旧暦)|11月19日]] - 前月[[10月18日 (旧暦)|10月18日]] 翌月[[12月18日 (旧暦)|12月18日]] *新暦[[11月18日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[寿永]]2年<!-- 平氏方 -->/[[治承]]7年<!-- 源氏方 -->（[[ユリウス暦]][[1184年]][[1月2日]]） - [[平氏]]追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]]が、[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * [[元文]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1741年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]]が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]]を創設 * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798年]][[1月4日]]） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[寛政暦]]」を採用。翌年から実施 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月13日]]） - [[油小路事件]]
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[12月11日]]） - [[光格天皇]]、119代[[天皇]]（* [[1771年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月13日]]） - [[伊東甲子太郎]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1867年]]） * 慶応3年（グレゴリオ暦1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1844年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:11月18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]]

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月18日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[寿永]]2年<!-- 平氏方 -->/[[治承]]7年<!-- 源氏方 -->（[[ユリウス暦]][[1184年]][[1月2日]]） - [[平氏]]追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]]が、[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * [[元文]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1741年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]]が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]]を創設 * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798年]][[1月4日]]） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[寛政暦]]」を採用。翌年から実施 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月13日]]） - [[油小路事件]]
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[12月11日]]） - [[光格天皇]]、119代[[天皇]]（* [[1771年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月13日]]） - [[伊東甲子太郎]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1867年]]） * 慶応3年（グレゴリオ暦1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1844年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

revision.text:
'''November 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar November}} ''November 18'''<!--Lunar November18--> is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:仏滅]]

'''November 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar November}} ''November 18'''<!--Lunar November18--> is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== Events == * [[寿永]]2年<!-- 平氏方 -->/[[治承]]7年<!-- 源氏方 -->（[[ユリウス暦]][[1184年]][[1月2日]]） - [[平氏]]追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]]が、[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * [[元文]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1741年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]]が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]]を創設 * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798年]][[1月4日]]） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[寛政暦]]」を採用。翌年から実施 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月13日]]） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[12月11日]]） - [[光格天皇]]、119代[[天皇]]（* [[1771年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月13日]]） - [[伊東甲子太郎]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1867年]]） * 慶応3年（グレゴリオ暦1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1844年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118}}

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:仏滅]]

{{Lunar November}} '''November 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
<!--== {{Lunar November}} ''November 18'''<!--Lunar November18 is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
--> == Events == * [[寿永]]2年<!-- 平氏方 -->/[[治承]]7年<!-- 源氏方 -->（[[ユリウス暦]][[1184年]][[1月2日]]） - [[平氏]]追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]]が、[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * [[元文]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1741年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]]が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]]を創設 * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798年]][[1月4日]]） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[寛政暦]]」を採用。翌年から実施 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月13日]]） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[12月11日]]） - [[光格天皇]]、119代[[天皇]]（* [[1771年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月13日]]） - [[伊東甲子太郎]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1867年]]） * 慶応3年（グレゴリオ暦1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1844年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118}}

== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[12月11日]]） - [[光格天皇]]、119代[[天皇]]（* [[1771年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月13日]]） - [[伊東甲子太郎]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1867年]]） * 慶応3年（グレゴリオ暦1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1844年]]）

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:仏滅]] to [[Category:Butsumetsu]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "旧暦360日" to "Old Lunar Calendar360日"
Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"
Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
removing all the commented out stuff
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion

adding korean to all the dates

Text replacement - "[[グレゴリオ暦]]" to "[[Gregorian Calendar]]"
removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template

[[sn:November 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] [[zh:十一月十八]] [[en:draft:November 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[寿永]]2年/[[治承]]7年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1184]][[1月2日]]） - [[平氏]]追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]]が、[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * [[元文]]5年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1741]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]]が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]]を創設 * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798]][[1月4日]]） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[寛政暦]]」を採用。翌年から実施 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867]][[12月13日]]） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840]][[12月11日]]） - [[光格天皇]]、119代[[天皇]]（* [[1771]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867]][[12月13日]]） - [[伊東甲子太郎]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1867]]） * 慶応3年（グレゴリオ暦1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1844]]）

[[sn:November 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] [[zh:十一月十八]] [[en:draft:November 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[寿永]]2年/[[治承]]7年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1184]][[1月2日]]） - [[平氏]]追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]]が、[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * [[元文]]5th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1741]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]]が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]]を創設 * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798]][[1月4日]]） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[寛政暦]]」を採用。翌年から実施 * [[慶応]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1867]][[12月13日]]） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[天保]]11th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1840]][[12月11日]]） - [[光格天皇]]、119代[[天皇]]（* [[1771]]） * [[慶応]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1867]][[12月13日]]） - [[伊東甲子太郎]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1867]]） * 慶応3rd year（グレゴリオ暦1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1844]]）

== Events == * [[寿永]]2年/[[治承]]7th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1184]][[1月2日]]） - [[平氏]]追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]]が、[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * [[元文]]5th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1741]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]]が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]]を創設 * [[寛政]]9th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1798]][[1月4日]]） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[寛政暦]]」を採用。翌年から実施 * [[慶応]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1867]][[12月13日]]） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[天保]]11th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1840]][[12月11日]]） - [[光格天皇]]、119代[[天皇]]（* [[1771]]） * [[慶応]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1867]][[12月13日]]） - [[伊東甲子太郎]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1867]]） * 慶応3rd year（グレゴリオ暦1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1844]]）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] [[zh:十一月十八]] [[en:draft:November 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Juei]] 2年/[[治承]] 7th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1184]] [[January 2]] ） - [[平氏]] 追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]] が、[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * Genbun5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1741]] [[January 5]] ） - [[徳川吉宗]] の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]] が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]] を創設 * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 4]] ） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[Kansei暦]] 」を採用。翌年から実施 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[December 11]] ） - [[光格天皇]] 、119代[[天皇]] （* [[1771]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[伊東甲子太郎]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1867]] ） * 慶応3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1844]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .

== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[December 11]] ） - [[光格天皇]] 、119代[[天皇]] （* [[1771]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[伊東甲子太郎]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1867]] ） * 慶応3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1844]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] [[zh:十一月十八]] [[en:draft:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Juei]] 2年/[[治承]] 7th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1184]] [[January 2]] ） - [[平氏]] 追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]] が、[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * Genbun5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1741]] [[January 5]] ） - [[徳川吉宗]] の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]] が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]] を創設 * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 4]] ） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[Kansei暦]] 」を採用。翌年から実施 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[December 11]] ） - [[光格天皇]] 、119代[[天皇]] （* [[1771]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[伊東甲子太郎]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1867]] ） * 慶応3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1844]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Juei]] 2年/[[治承]] 7th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1184]] [[January 2]] ） - [[平氏]] 追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]] が、[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * Genbun5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1741]] [[January 5]] ） - [[徳川吉宗]] の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]] が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]] を創設 * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 4]] ） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[Kansei暦]] 」を採用。翌年から実施 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[December 11]] ） - [[光格天皇]] 、119代[[天皇]] （* [[1771]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[伊東甲子太郎]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1867]] ） * 慶応3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1844]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "後白河天皇" to "Emperor Go-Shirakawa"
revision.text:
[[sn:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] [[zh:十一月十八]] [[en:draft:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Juei]] 2年/[[治承]] 7th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1184]] [[January 2]] ） - [[平氏]] 追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]] が、[[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * Genbun5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1741]] [[January 5]] ） - [[徳川吉宗]] の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]] が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]] を創設 * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 4]] ） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[Kansei暦]] 」を採用。翌年から実施 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[December 11]] ） - [[光格天皇]] 、119代[[天皇]] （* [[1771]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[伊東甲子太郎]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1867]] ） * 慶応3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1844]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118}}

[[sn:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] [[zh:十一月十八]] [[en:draft:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Juei]] 2年/[[治承]] 7th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1184]] [[January 2]] ） - [[平氏]] 追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]] が、[[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * Genbun5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1741]] [[January 5]] ） - [[徳川吉宗]] の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]] が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]] を創設 * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 4]] ） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[Kansei暦]] 」を採用。翌年から実施 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[December 11]] ） - [[光格天皇]] 、119代[[天皇]] （* [[1771]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[伊東甲子太郎]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1867]] ） * 慶応3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1844]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118}}

[[sn:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] [[zh:十一月十八]] [[en:draft:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Juei]] 2年/[[治承]] 7th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1184]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Taira Clan]] 追討に失敗し京に帰った[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が、[[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * Genbun5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1741]] [[January 5]] ） - [[Tokugawa Yoshimune]] の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]] が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]] を創設 * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 4]] ） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[Kansei暦]] 」を採用。翌年から実施 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[December 11]] ） - [[光格天皇]] 、119代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1771]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[伊東甲子太郎]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1867]] ） * 慶応3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1844]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Juei]] 2年/[[治承]] 7th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1184]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Taira Clan]] 追討に失敗し京に帰った[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が、[[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * Genbun5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1741]] [[January 5]] ） - [[Tokugawa Yoshimune]] の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]] が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]] を創設 * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 4]] ） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[Kansei暦]] 」を採用。翌年から実施 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[油小路事件]]

revision.text:
[[sn:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] [[zh:十一月十八]] [[en:draft:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Juei]] 2年/[[治承]] 7th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1184]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Taira Clan]] 追討に失敗し京に帰った[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が、[[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * Genbun5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1741]] [[January 5]] ） - [[Tokugawa Yoshimune]] の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]] が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]] を創設 * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 4]] ） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[Kansei暦]] 」を採用。翌年から実施 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[December 11]] ） - [[光格天皇]] 、119代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1771]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[伊東甲子太郎]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1867]] ） * 慶応3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1844]] ） == See Also! ==

[[sn:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] [[zh:十一月十八]] [[en:draft:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Juei]] 2nd year /[[治承]] 7th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1184]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Taira Clan]] 追討に失敗し京に帰った[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が、[[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * Genbun5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1741]] [[January 5]] ） - [[Tokugawa Yoshimune]] の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]] が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]] を創設 * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 4]] ） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[Kansei暦]] 」を採用。翌年から実施 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[December 11]] ） - [[光格天皇]] 、119代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1771]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[伊東甲子太郎]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1867]] ） * 慶応3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1867th year 12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1844]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] [[zh:十一月十八]] [[en:draft:November 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Juei]] 2nd year /[[治承]] 7th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1184]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Taira Clan]] 追討に失敗し京に帰った[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が、[[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * Genbun5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1741]] [[January 5]] ） - [[Tokugawa Yoshimune]] の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]] が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]] を創設 * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 4]] ） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[Kansei暦]] 」を採用。翌年から実施 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[December 11]] ） - [[光格天皇]] 、119代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1771]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[伊東甲子太郎]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1867]] ） * 慶応3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1867th year 12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1844]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Juei]] 2nd year /[[治承]] 7th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1184]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Taira Clan]] 追討に失敗し京に帰った[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が、[[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * Genbun5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1741]] [[January 5]] ） - [[Tokugawa Yoshimune]] の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]] が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]] を創設 * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 4]] ） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[Kansei暦]] 」を採用。翌年から実施 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[油小路事件]]
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[December 11]] ） - [[光格天皇]] 、119代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1771]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 13]] ） - [[伊東甲子太郎]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1867]] ） * 慶応3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1867th year 12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]] 、[[御陵衛士]] （* [[1844]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]]
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Juei era / 7th year of the Jishō era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} [[1184]] {{ill|January 2|ja|1月2日}}) – After his failed campaign against the Taira clan, Minamoto no Yoshinaka, returning to Kyoto, launched a sudden attack on the palace and the Hōju-ji residence of Emperor Go-Shirakawa and confined the emperor. * In the 5th year of the Genbun era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1741]] {{ill|January 5|ja|1月5日}}) – Tokugawa Yoshimune’s fourth son, Tokugawa Sōin, was granted a residence within the Ichibashi Gate area, thus founding the Ichibashi family. * In the 9th year of the Kansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1798]] {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日}}) – A new calendar based on Western astronomy, known as the "Kansei Calendar," was adopted; its use began the following year. * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1867]] {{ill|December 13|ja|12月13日}}) – The Yubisu Incident occurred.
== Births == <!-- None listed -->
== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1840]] {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}}) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1867]] {{ill|December 13|ja|12月13日}}) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118}}

== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Juei era / 7th year of the Jishō era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} [[1184]] {{ill|January 2|ja|1月2日|12=draft}}) – After his failed campaign against the Taira clan, Minamoto no Yoshinaka, returning to Kyoto, launched a sudden attack on the palace and the Hōju-ji residence of Emperor Go-Shirakawa and confined the emperor. * In the 5th year of the Genbun era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1741]] {{ill|January 5|ja|1月5日|12=draft}}) – Tokugawa Yoshimune’s fourth son, Tokugawa Sōin, was granted a residence within the Ichibashi Gate area, thus founding the Ichibashi family. * In the 9th year of the Kansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1798]] {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日|12=draft}}) – A new calendar based on Western astronomy, known as the "Kansei Calendar," was adopted; its use began the following year. * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1867]] {{ill|December 13|ja|12月13日|12=draft}}) – The Yubisu Incident occurred.
== Births == <!-- None listed -->
== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1840]] {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日|12=draft}}) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1867]] {{ill|December 13|ja|12月13日|12=draft}}) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118|12=draft}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月18日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[寿永]]2年<!-- 平氏方 -->/[[治承]]7年<!-- 源氏方 -->（[[ユリウス暦]][[1184年]][[1月2日]]） - [[平氏]]追討に失敗し京に帰った[[源義仲]]が、[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]の御所・法住寺殿を急襲し法皇を幽閉 * [[元文]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1741年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]の四男[[徳川宗尹|宗尹]]が一橋門内に屋敷を与えられ、[[一橋家]]を創設 * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798年]][[1月4日]]） - 西洋天文学に基づく新暦「[[寛政暦]]」を採用。翌年から実施 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月13日]]） - [[油小路事件]]
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[12月11日]]） - [[光格天皇]]、119代[[天皇]]（* [[1771年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月13日]]） - [[伊東甲子太郎]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1867年]]） * 慶応3年（グレゴリオ暦1867年12月13日） - [[藤堂平助]]、[[御陵衛士]]（* [[1844年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[11月18日 (旧暦)]] to [[November 18 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|November 18|qq=November 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Juei era / 7th year of the Jishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1184|1184]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]) – After his failed campaign against the Taira clan, Minamoto no Yoshinaka, returning to Kyoto, launched a sudden attack on the palace and the Hōju-ji residence of Emperor Go-Shirakawa and confined the emperor. * In the 5th year of the Genbun era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1741|1741]] [[:en:January 5|January 5]]) – Tokugawa Yoshimune’s fourth son, Tokugawa Sōin, was granted a residence within the Ichibashi Gate area, thus founding the Ichibashi family. * In the 9th year of the Kansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – A new calendar based on Western astronomy, known as the "Kansei Calendar," was adopted; its use began the following year. * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – The Yubisu Incident occurred.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十八]]
{{translated page|ja|11月18日 (旧暦)|version=69017934|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840471]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 18|qq=November 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Juei era / 7th year of the Jishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1184|1184]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]) – After his failed campaign against the Taira clan, Minamoto no Yoshinaka, returning to Kyoto, launched a sudden attack on the palace and the Hōju-ji residence of Emperor Go-Shirakawa and confined the emperor. * In the 5th year of the Genbun era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1741|1741]] [[:en:January 5|January 5]]) – Tokugawa Yoshimune’s fourth son, Tokugawa Sōin, was granted a residence within the Ichibashi Gate area, thus founding the Ichibashi family. * In the 9th year of the Kansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – A new calendar based on Western astronomy, known as the "Kansei Calendar," was adopted; its use began the following year. * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – The Yubisu Incident occurred.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Juei era / 7th year of the Jishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1184|1184]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]) – After his failed campaign against the Taira clan, Minamoto no Yoshinaka, returning to Kyoto, launched a sudden attack on the palace and the Hōju-ji residence of Emperor Go-Shirakawa and confined the emperor. * In the 5th year of the Genbun era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1741|1741]] [[:en:January 5|January 5]]) – Tokugawa Yoshimune’s fourth son, Tokugawa Sōin, was granted a residence within the Ichibashi Gate area, thus founding the Ichibashi family. * In the 9th year of the Kansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – A new calendar based on Western astronomy, known as the "Kansei Calendar," was adopted; its use began the following year. * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – The Yubisu Incident occurred.

== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Juei era / 7th year of the Jishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1184|1184]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]) – After his failed campaign against the Taira clan, Minamoto no Yoshinaka, returning to Kyoto, launched a sudden attack on the palace and the Hōju-ji residence of Emperor Go-Shirakawa and confined the emperor. * In the 5th year of the Genbun era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1741|1741]] [[:en:January 5|January 5]]) – Tokugawa Yoshimune’s fourth son, Tokugawa Sōin, was granted a residence within the Ichibashi Gate area, thus founding the Ichibashi family. * In the 9th year of the Kansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – A new calendar based on Western astronomy, known as the "Kansei Calendar," was adopted; its use began the following year. * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – The Yubisu Incident occurred.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Juei era / 7th year of the Jishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1184|1184]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]) – After his failed campaign against the Taira clan, Minamoto no Yoshinaka, returning to Kyoto, launched a sudden attack on the palace and the Hōju-ji residence of Emperor Go-Shirakawa and confined the emperor. * In the 5th year of the Genbun era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1741|1741]] [[:en:January 5|January 5]]) – Tokugawa Yoshimune’s fourth son, Tokugawa Sōin, was granted a residence within the Ichibashi Gate area, thus founding the Ichibashi family. * In the 9th year of the Kansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – A new calendar based on Western astronomy, known as the "Kansei Calendar," was adopted; its use began the following year. * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – The Yubisu Incident occurred.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).

== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Juei era / 7th year of the Jishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1184|1184]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]) – After his failed campaign against the Taira clan, Minamoto no Yoshinaka, returning to Kyoto, launched a sudden attack on the palace and the Hōju-ji residence of Emperor Go-Shirakawa and confined the emperor. * In the 5th year of the Genbun era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1741|1741]] [[:en:January 5|January 5]]) – Tokugawa Yoshimune’s fourth son, Tokugawa Sōin, was granted a residence within the Ichibashi Gate area, thus founding the Ichibashi family. * In the 9th year of the Kansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – A new calendar based on Western astronomy, known as the "Kansei Calendar," was adopted; its use began the following year. * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – The Yubisu Incident occurred.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).

== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十八]][[zh:十一月十八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840471]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 18|qq=November 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Juei era / 7th year of the Jishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1184|1184]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]) – After his failed campaign against the Taira clan, Minamoto no Yoshinaka, returning to Kyoto, launched a sudden attack on the palace and the Hōju-ji residence of Emperor Go-Shirakawa and confined the emperor. * In the 5th year of the Genbun era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1741|1741]] [[:en:January 5|January 5]]) – Tokugawa Yoshimune’s fourth son, Tokugawa Sōin, was granted a residence within the Ichibashi Gate area, thus founding the Ichibashi family. * In the 9th year of the Kansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – A new calendar based on Western astronomy, known as the "Kansei Calendar," was adopted; its use began the following year. * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – The Yubisu Incident occurred.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|17|11|19|10|18|12|11|1118|qq=}}

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Juei era / 7th year of the Jishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1184|1184]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]) – After his failed campaign against the Taira clan, Minamoto no Yoshinaka, returning to Kyoto, launched a sudden attack on the palace and the Hōju-ji residence of Emperor Go-Shirakawa and confined the emperor. * In the 5th year of the Genbun era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1741|1741]] [[:en:January 5|January 5]]) – Tokugawa Yoshimune’s fourth son, Tokugawa Sōin, was granted a residence within the Ichibashi Gate area, thus founding the Ichibashi family. * In the 9th year of the Kansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – A new calendar based on Western astronomy, known as the "Kansei Calendar," was adopted; its use began the following year. * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – The Yubisu Incident occurred.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).

== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).

== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|December 13|en|December 13|WD=Q2379|lt=December 13}}) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).

== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|December 13|en|December 13|WD=Q2379|lt=December 13}}) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).

== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Juei era / 7th year of the Jishō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1184|en|1184|WD=Q19728|lt=1184|1=1184}} {{ill|January 2|en|January 2|WD=Q2151|lt=January 2|1=January 2}}) – After his failed campaign against the Taira clan, Minamoto no Yoshinaka, returning to Kyoto, launched a sudden attack on the palace and the Hōju-ji residence of Emperor Go-Shirakawa and confined the emperor. * In the 5th year of the Genbun era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1741|en|1741|WD=Q7573|lt=1741|1=1741}} {{ill|January 5|en|January 5|WD=Q2202|lt=January 5|1=January 5}}) – Tokugawa Yoshimune’s fourth son, Tokugawa Sōin, was granted a residence within the Ichibashi Gate area, thus founding the Ichibashi family. * In the 9th year of the Kansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1798|en|1798|WD=Q7823|lt=1798|1=1798}} {{ill|January 4|en|January 4|WD=Q2168|lt=January 4|1=January 4}}) – A new calendar based on Western astronomy, known as the "Kansei Calendar," was adopted; its use began the following year. * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|December 13|en|December 13|WD=Q2379|lt=December 13|1=December 13}}) – The Yubisu Incident occurred.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11|1=December 11}}) – Emperor Kōkaku, the 119th Emperor of Japan (born 1771). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|December 13|en|December 13|WD=Q2379|lt=December 13|1=December 13}}) – Itō Kōshitatarō, a palace guard (born 1867). * Also in the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1867, December 13) – Tōdō Heisuke, another palace guard (born 1844).
